description: SSH commit-signature verification vectors for SemVer-Trust (spec/semver-trust.md §4.2, §5.2, §10 step 3; docs/conformance-crypto-fixtures.md). Fixture repositories are built by build-fixture-repos.sh (deterministic: pinned epoch, sha1 object format, deterministic Ed25519 signatures); commits are addressed by role tag AND pinned SHA — a SHA mismatch means the fixture build recipe drifted (expected <sha> for role <label>, got another; the recipe or its inputs changed), not that verification is wrong. The verifier consumes keys/allowed_signers as injected trust material and verifies at the pinned verification_time (ADR-018); every 'verification_failed' expectation is an abort — unverifiable is never T0 (§5.2).

vectors.description: An enrolled human key (human-alice) verifies and resolves to its principal.
An enrolled machine identity (agent-ci-bot) verifies and resolves to its principal; identity class mapping is the policy layer's job, not the signature verifier's.
The second, distinct enrolled human (human-bob) — the reviewer identity that makes T3 reachable — verifies independently.
unknown-mallory holds a valid key that is absent from every allowed-signers file: verification fails closed. Unverifiable is not T0 — the release aborts (§5.2, §10 step 3).
revoked-carol is enrolled with valid-before preceding the fixture epoch: enrolled-but-invalid at the injected verification time, a failure mode distinct from unknown.

The key-family rider (fixture plan §2.1): a commit carrying a PGP-armored signature under an SSH-only verifier is unverifiable and MUST abort — never skipped, never silently degraded. GPG support, when it lands, changes this vector's reason, not its fail-closed shape.
A commit whose message was altered after signing: the sshsig is well-formed but does not cover the bytes; verification fails closed.

A commit with no signature at all is unverifiable: every commit on a protected branch MUST be signed (§4.2). Synthetic case — the harness strips the signature from the alice commit rather than a fixture repo carrying one.
